heading: Employees’ right to petition Congress
label: 7211 Employees’ right to petition Congress
text: The right of employees, individually or collectively, to petition Congress or a Member of Congress, or to furnish information to either House of Congress, or to a committee or Member thereof, may not be interfered with or denied.
